evals.prompt: Have we already decided on an embedding provider? Before I commit to fastembed, search memory for prior decisions or notes about it.
evals.expected_output: vestige recall "embedding provider" --json (ideally --hybrid). Then a brief reading of the top hits, citing handles.

evals.prompt: I'm about to start a refactor of vestige-store::repr_sync. What did we say about the FTS triggers and soft-delete sync? Look it up before I touch anything.
evals.expected_output: vestige recall "FTS triggers soft-delete sync" --json --hybrid. Cite handles found.

evals.prompt: have we discussed adding a daemon mode? I want to ground the answer in what's already in memory rather than guess.
evals.expected_output: vestige recall "daemon mode" --json --hybrid (or --type question if narrowing).
